metadata.description: Known issue→fix patterns for Compass QA auto-fix engine

patterns.symptom: map shows Toronto for Brooklyn address
patterns.root_cause: saddr/daddr embed format ignores place_id; falls back to generic region search
patterns.fix: use Google Maps Embed API place embed with explicit place_id

patterns.symptom: city shows Ontario for non-Ontario place
patterns.root_cause: hardcoded fallback city in discovery data or adaptCottage function
patterns.fix: extract city from address field using comma-split heuristic; use context key to override (NYC context → New York)

patterns.symptom: hero shows orange gradient instead of food photo
patterns.root_cause: discovery.heroImage is null — no photo fetched from Google Places at discovery time
patterns.fix: call Google Places Details API with place_id to get photo_reference, upload to Blob, update discovery.heroImage

patterns.symptom: missing card stub — no card.json exists for place_id
patterns.root_cause: Discovery added to Blob but no local data/placecards/{id}/card.json created
patterns.fix: create minimal card.json stub from discovery fields, add to index.json
